stemHtml:
Find the correct decode using the following extract from a SNOWTAM for LFPG.

SNOWTAM 0125
LFPG
02170530 R25R 2/3/2 100/100/100 08/05/08 SLUSH/WET SNOW/SLUSH
02170530 R25C 3/3/2 100/100/100 06/06/08 WET SNOW/WET SNOW/SLUSH
02170530 R25L 3/3/2 100/100/100 06/06/10 WET SNOW/WET SNOW/SLUSH

options.a: Runway 25 R has WET ICE on the second third of the runway, with a depth of 5 mm
options.b: Runway 25 C has WET SNOW on the first third of the runway, with a depth of 8 mm
options.c: Runway 25 C has WET SNOW on the last third of the runway, with a depth of 6 mm
options.d: Runway 25 L has WET SNOW on the first third of the runway, with a depth of 6 mm
